<style>
  * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
  body { background:#FCFBF8; -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased; text-rendering:optimizeLegibility; }
  .ph { background:#ece5e9; }
  .lk { cursor:pointer; transition:color .12s; }
  .lk:hover { color:#A60F2D !important; }
  .ba-navgroup { position:relative; }
  .ba-navlink { cursor:pointer; padding:14px 13px; display:inline-block; white-space:nowrap; transition:color .12s; }
  .ba-navgroup:hover .ba-navlink { color:#A60F2D; }
  .ba-dropdown { position:absolute; top:100%; left:0; opacity:0; visibility:hidden; transform:translateY(7px); transition:opacity .18s ease, transform .18s ease; z-index:140; }
  .ba-navgroup:hover .ba-dropdown { opacity:1; visibility:visible; transform:translateY(0); }
  .ba-dropdown-inner { background:#fff; border:1px solid #d6ccd3; border-top:2.5px solid #A60F2D; border-radius:3px; box-shadow:0 26px 52px -14px rgba(46,33,71,.30); padding:7px 0; min-width:212px; }
  .ba-dropitem { padding:9px 22px; font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif; font-size:13.5px; font-weight:600; color:#4A4150; white-space:nowrap; cursor:pointer; transition:color .14s, background .14s; }
  .ba-dropitem:hover { color:#A60F2D; background:#faf5f3; }
  .ba-cc-card { transition:transform .16s ease, box-shadow .16s ease, border-color .16s ease; }
  .ba-cc-card:hover { transform:translateY(-3px); box-shadow:0 18px 36px -20px rgba(46,33,71,.45); }
  .ba-cc-card:hover .ba-cc-view { color:#A60F2D; }
  .ba-cc-head:hover .ba-cc-title { color:#A60F2D; }
  .ba-cc-lead:hover .ba-cc-leadt { color:#A60F2D; }
</style>
<style>
  :root{
    --paper:#FCFBF8; --paper-2:#F4EEF0; --ph:#ece5e9;
    --ink:#241a33; --ink-soft:#4a4150; --muted:#6e6571; --faint:#9a958c;
    --line:#ece9e2; --line-strong:#ddd5cf;
    --accent:#A60F2D; --navy:#2E2147; --up:#1f8a5b; --down:#A60F2D;
  }
  .ba-serif{font-family:'Newsreader',Georgia,serif;}
  .ba-mono{font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;}
  .ba-rail-h{white-space:nowrap;}
  .ba-tint{background:#faf6f4;}
  .ba-promo{background:#2E2147;}
  .ba-card{transition:transform .28s cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1);}
  .ba-card:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);}
  .ba-card-img{transition:transform .5s cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1);}
  .ba-card:hover .ba-card-img{transform:scale(1.04);}
  .ba-htitle{color:#2E2147; transition:color .15s ease;}
  .ba-card:hover .ba-htitle, a:hover>.ba-htitle{color:var(--accent);}
  .ba-uline{background-image:linear-gradient(var(--accent),var(--accent)); background-size:0% 1.5px; background-position:0 100%; background-repeat:no-repeat; transition:background-size .25s ease;}
  .ba-uline:hover{background-size:100% 1.5px;}
  .ba-btn{transition:background .15s,color .15s,border-color .15s,transform .12s,box-shadow .15s;}
  .ba-btn:hover{border-color:var(--accent); transform:translateY(-1px); box-shadow:0 5px 14px -7px rgba(166,15,45,.45);}
  .ba-btn:active{transform:translateY(0);}
  .ba-navlink:hover{color:var(--accent);}
  /* ---- fill remaining hover gaps so everything reacts ---- */
  .ba-chip{cursor:pointer; transition:background .16s ease,color .16s ease,border-color .16s ease,transform .16s ease;}
  .ba-chip:hover{background:#A60F2D; color:#fff !important; border-color:#A60F2D; transform:translateY(-2px);}
  .ba-search{cursor:pointer; transition:border-color .16s ease, box-shadow .16s ease;}
  .ba-search:hover{border-color:#A60F2D !important; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(166,15,45,.07);}
  .ba-pill{cursor:pointer; transition:filter .15s ease, transform .12s ease, box-shadow .16s ease;}
  .ba-pill:hover{filter:brightness(1.07); transform:translateY(-1px); box-shadow:0 7px 18px -7px rgba(166,15,45,.55);}
  .ba-pill:active{transform:translateY(0);}
  .ba-logo{transition:opacity .15s ease, transform .15s ease;}
  .ba-logo:hover{opacity:.85;}
  .ba-langitem{transition:background .12s ease;}
  .ba-langitem:hover{background:#faf6f4;}
  /* ---- make link/card titles visibly react even with inline colors ---- */
  .lk:hover h1, .lk:hover h2, .lk:hover h3, .lk:hover h4, .lk:hover h5, .lk:hover .ba-htitle{color:#A60F2D !important;}
  .ba-card:hover h1, .ba-card:hover h2, .ba-card:hover h3, .ba-card:hover h4, .ba-card:hover h5{color:#A60F2D !important;}
  /* ---- banner buttons + close icons ---- */
  .ba-bbtn{transition:transform .12s ease, box-shadow .16s ease, background .15s ease, filter .15s ease;}
  .ba-bbtn:hover{transform:translateY(-1px); box-shadow:0 6px 16px -8px rgba(0,0,0,.45);}
  .ba-x{transition:color .14s ease, transform .14s ease;}
  .ba-x:hover{color:#A60F2D !important; transform:scale(1.15);}
  /* ---- breaking ticker marquee ---- */
  @keyframes ba-ticker{from{transform:translateX(0);}to{transform:translateX(-50%);}}
  .ba-ticker-track{display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:26px; white-space:nowrap; animation:ba-ticker 38s linear infinite; will-change:transform;}
  .ba-ticker-mask:hover .ba-ticker-track{animation-play-state:paused;}
  .ba-ticker-item{font-family:'Newsreader',serif; font-weight:600; font-size:14px; color:#fff; cursor:pointer; transition:opacity .14s ease;}
  .ba-ticker-item:hover{text-decoration:underline; text-underline-offset:3px;}
  .ba-cta-input::placeholder{color:#f4c2cb;}
</style>
<script src="f0231083-3ae9-409c-94ac-e73e182e72af"></script>
</helmet>

      <p style="font-family:'Newsreader',serif; font-size:17px; line-height:1.5; color:#544e57; margin-bottom:15px;">In its biggest strategic reallocation since 2008, the fund is shifting away from developed-market equities and into ports, grids and data centres across the ASEAN-6. It is a bet that the region’s build-out is the decade’s defining trade.</p>

              <h4 class="ba-cc-leadt" style="font-family:'Newsreader',serif; font-weight:600; font-size:18px; line-height:1.22; color:#2E2147; transition:color .14s;">{{ c.lead.title }}</h4>
            </div>
          </sc-if>
          <sc-for list="{{ c.items }}" as="a" hint-placeholder-count="2">
            <h5 class="ba-cc-row lk" onclick="{{ a.onClick }}" style="font-family:'Newsreader',serif; font-weight:600; font-size:14px; line-height:1.28; color:#2E2147; margin:0; padding:10px 0; border-top:1px solid #f3f0ea; cursor:pointer;">{{ a.title }}</h5>
          </sc-for>
        </div>
      </sc-for>
    </div>
  </sc-for>
</div>
</sc-if>

<!-- Asia · Markets sub-tab -->

<div style="max-width:1280px; margin:0 auto; padding:34px 28px 8px;">

  <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr); gap:1px; background:#e3ddd6; border:1px solid #e3ddd6; border-radius:3px; overflow:hidden;">

<div style="max-width:1280px; margin:0 auto; padding:36px 28px 50px;">

    <span class="lk" onclick="{{ goFinanceMarkets }}" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Sans'; font-weight:700; font-size:12px; letter-spacing:0.08em; color:#A60F2D; cursor:pointer; white-space:nowrap;">ALL MARKETS →</span>

        <div style="overflow:hidden; border-radius:3px; margin-bottom:13px;"><img src="{{ a.img }}" alt="" loading="lazy" class="ba-card-img" style="width:100%; aspect-ratio:16/10; object-fit:cover; display:block;"></div>
        <div style="font-family:'IBM Plex Sans'; font-weight:800; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:0.07em; color:#A60F2D; margin-bottom:8px;">{{ a.kicker }}</div>
        <h4 class="ba-htitle" style="font-family:'Newsreader',serif; font-weight:600; font-size:18px; line-height:1.2; margin-bottom:8px;">{{ a.title }}</h4>
        <div style="font-family:'IBM Plex Sans'; font-weight:500; font-size:11px; color:#a8a39b;">{{ a.author }}</div>
      </a>
    </sc-for>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- =================== ARTICLE =================== -->
  <sc-if value="{{ isArticle }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}">
  <div style="max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 28px;">
    <div class="ba-mono" style="display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; padding: 16px 0; font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); letter-spacing: .04em; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);">
      <a onclick="{{ goHome }}" class="ba-navlink" style="cursor: pointer;">Home</a><span style="color: var(--faint);">/</span>
      <a onclick="{{ goFinance }}" class="ba-navlink" style="cursor: pointer;">Finance</a><span style="color: var(--faint);">/</span>
      <span style="color: var(--ink-soft);">Markets</span>
    </div>
    <div style="max-width: 820px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 32px 0 22px; text-align: center;">
      <div style="font-family:'IBM Plex Sans'; font-weight:800; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:0.07em; color:#A60F2D; margin-bottom:14px;">FINANCE · MARKETS</div>
      <h1 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 18px; font-size: 42px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -0.5px; color: #2E2147;">{{ article.title }}</h1>
      <p class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 24px; font-size: 20px; line-height: 1.5; color: #544e57;">{{ article.standfirst }}</p>
      <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; padding-top: 18px; border-top: 1px solid var(--line);">
        <div><div style="font-family:'IBM Plex Sans'; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: #2E2147;">{{ article.author }}</div><div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted);">{{ article.role }}</div></div>
        <span style="width: 1px; height: 30px; background: var(--line);"></span>
        <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.5;">{{ article.date }}<br><span style="color: var(--faint);">{{ article.updated }} · {{ article.read }}</span></div>
        <span style="width: 1px; height: 30px; background: var(--line);"></span>
        <div style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 9px;">
          <button onclick="{{ toggleAudio }}" class="ba-btn" aria-label="{{ audioBtnLabel }}" style="flex: none; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--accent); color: #fff; border: none; cursor: pointer; display: grid; place-items: center;">
            <sc-if value="{{ audioOn }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}"><svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="6" y="5" width="4" height="14" rx="1"></rect><rect x="14" y="5" width="4" height="14" rx="1"></rect></svg></sc-if>
            <sc-if value="{{ audioOff }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ true }}"><svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M8 5v14l11-7z"></path></svg></sc-if>
          </button>
          <span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Sans'; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--ink); white-space: nowrap;">Listen</span>
          <span class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); letter-spacing: .02em; white-space: nowrap;">{{ articleAudioCur }} / {{ articleAudioTotal }}</span>
        </div>
        <span style="width: 1px; height: 30px; background: var(--line);"></span>
        <button onclick="{{ toggleArticleSave }}" class="ba-btn" aria-label="{{ articleSaveLabel }}" style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; background: {{ articleSaveBg }}; color: {{ articleSaveFg }}; border: 1px solid {{ articleSaveBd }}; border-radius: 999px; padding: 7px 14px 7px 11px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer;">
          <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="{{ articleSaveIconFill }}" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M6 3h12a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v17l-7-4-7 4V4a1 1 0 0 1 1-1z"></path></svg>{{ articleSaveLabel }}
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <figure style="margin: 0 0 10px;">
      <image-slot id="ba-article-hero" src="0137cda9-37a8-470d-92a8-9f287baa2e7e" placeholder="Drop hero photo" shape="rounded" radius="3" style="display:block; width:100%; height:440px; background:var(--ph);"></image-slot>
      <figcaption class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); padding: 9px 2px; letter-spacing: .02em;">The fund’s reallocation targets ports, grids and data centres across the ASEAN-6. <span style="color: var(--faint);">Photo: BriefAsia</span></figcaption>
    </figure>
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 60px minmax(0, 720px) 1fr; gap: 40px; justify-content: center; padding: 24px 0 40px;">
      <div>
        <div style="position: sticky; top: 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; align-items: center;">
          <span class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--faint); letter-spacing: .1em; writing-mode: vertical-rl; margin-bottom: 6px;">SHARE</span>
          <sc-for list="{{ shareIcons }}" as="i" hint-placeholder-count="4">
            <div style="position: relative; display: grid; place-items: center;">
              <a class="ba-btn" href="{{ i.href }}" onclick="{{ i.onClick }}" target="{{ i.target }}" rel="noopener" aria-label="{{ i.label }}" style="cursor: pointer; width: 38px; height: 38px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid {{ i.ring }}; background: {{ i.fill }}; display: grid; place-items: center; font-size: 13.5px; color: var(--ink-soft); transition: border-color .15s ease, background .15s ease;">{{ i.icon }}</a>
              <sc-if value="{{ i.showCopied }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}">
                <span style="position: absolute; left: 50px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #A60F2D; color: #fff; font-family:'IBM Plex Sans'; font-weight: 600; font-size: 11.5px; letter-spacing: .01em; padding: 7px 12px; border-radius: 999px; white-space: nowrap; box-shadow: 0 8px 22px -8px rgba(166,15,45,.7); z-index: 6;"><svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M9 16.17 4.83 12l-1.42 1.41L9 19 21 7l-1.41-1.41z"></path></svg>Link copied</span>
              </sc-if>
              <sc-if value="{{ i.showPrompt }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}">
                <span style="position: absolute; left: 50px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #2E2147; padding: 7px 10px; border-radius: 9px; white-space: nowrap; box-shadow: 0 10px 26px -8px rgba(0,0,0,.5); z-index: 7;">
                  <input id="ba-copy-input" value="{{ i.promptUrl }}" readonly="" onfocus="{{ selectOnFocus }}" style="width: 168px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.12); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.28); border-radius: 5px; color: #fff; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; padding: 5px 8px; outline: none;">
                  <span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Sans'; font-weight: 600; font-size: 11px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.7); white-space: nowrap;">⌘C to copy</span>
                </span>
              </sc-if>
            </div>
          </sc-for>
        </div>
      </div>
      <article>
        <div class="ba-tint" style="border-left: 3px solid var(--accent); border-radius: 3px; padding: 18px 22px; margin-bottom: 30px;">
          <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 11px;">KEY TAKEAWAYS</div>
          <ul style="margin: 0; padding: 0; list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 9px;">
            <sc-for list="{{ lead.takeaways }}" as="k" hint-placeholder-count="3">
              <li style="font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.45; color: var(--ink-soft); display: flex; gap: 10px;"><span style="color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600;">·</span><span>{{ k }}</span></li>
            </sc-for>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <sc-for list="{{ bodyLede }}" as="p" hint-placeholder-count="2">
          <p class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 22px; font-size: 20px; line-height: 1.62; color: var(--ink);">{{ p }}</p>
        </sc-for>
        <figure style="margin: 34px 0;">
          <div style="overflow: hidden; border-radius: 3px;"><img src="652527b8-6ab0-45f3-8234-6fe53fff8511" alt="" loading="lazy" class="ba-card-img" style="width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 16/9; object-fit: cover; display: block; background: var(--ph);"></div>
          <figcaption class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); padding: 9px 2px 0; letter-spacing: .02em;">Container traffic at the Port of Singapore, the region’s busiest transhipment hub. <span style="color: var(--faint);">Photo: BriefAsia</span></figcaption>
        </figure>
        <blockquote style="margin: 32px 0; padding: 6px 0 6px 26px; border-left: 3px solid var(--accent);">
          <p class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 500; font-style: italic; line-height: 1.26; letter-spacing: -0.01em;">"{{ pullQuote }}"</p>
        </blockquote>
        <sc-for list="{{ bodyRest }}" as="p" hint-placeholder-count="3">
          <p class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 22px; font-size: 20px; line-height: 1.62; color: var(--ink);">{{ p }}</p>
        </sc-for>
        <figure style="margin: 34px 0;"><div style="overflow: hidden; border-radius: 3px;"><img src="2ed922d7-0e3c-464a-8ed2-30ab7ac94cb8" alt="" loading="lazy" class="ba-card-img" style="width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 16/9; object-fit: cover; display: block; background: var(--ph);"></div><figcaption class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); padding: 8px 2px 0;">Data-centre build-out, Johor.</figcaption></figure>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; margin: 26px 0;">
          <sc-for list="{{ tags }}" as="t" hint-placeholder-count="6"><a onclick="{{ goTopic }}" class="ba-btn" style="cursor: pointer; font-size: 12px; padding: 6px 12px; border: 1px solid var(--line-strong); border-radius: 999px; color: var(--ink-soft);">{{ t }}</a></sc-for>
        </div>
        <div class="ba-tint" style="display: flex; gap: 16px; padding: 22px; border-radius: 3px; margin-top: 30px;">
          <div><div style="font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 3px;">{{ article.author }}</div><div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 8px;">{{ article.role }}</div><p style="margin: 0; font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.5; color: var(--ink-soft);">Mei Lin covers capital markets and sovereign capital across Asia from Singapore. She has reported on the region’s financial system for over a decade.</p></div>
        </div>
      </article>
      <aside>
        <div style="position: sticky; top: 24px;">
          <div style="border-bottom: 2px solid var(--navy); padding-bottom: 8px; margin-bottom: 4px;"><h3 class="ba-serif ba-rail-h" style="margin: 0; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600;">Most Read</h3></div>
          <sc-for list="{{ mostRead }}" as="m" hint-placeholder-count="5">
            <a onclick="{{ openArticle }}" class="ba-card" style="cursor: pointer; display: flex; gap: 11px; padding: 12px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line); align-items: baseline;">
              <h4 class="ba-htitle" style="margin: 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.28;">{{ m.title }}</h4>
            </a>
          </sc-for>
        </div>
      </aside>
    </div>
    <section style="border-top: 2px solid var(--navy); padding: 28px 0 50px;">
      <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 20px;">RELATED STORIES</div>
      <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 24px;">
        <sc-for list="{{ related }}" as="r" hint-placeholder-count="4">
          <a onclick="{{ openArticle }}" class="ba-card" style="cursor: pointer; display: flex; flex-direction: column;">
            <div style="overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 13px; border-radius: 3px;"><img src="{{ r.img }}" alt="" loading="lazy" class="ba-card-img" style="width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 16/9; object-fit: cover; display: block; background: var(--ph);"></div>
            <div style="font-family:'IBM Plex Sans'; font-weight:800; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:0.07em; color:#A60F2D; margin-bottom:7px;">{{ r.kicker }}</div>
            <h3 class="ba-serif ba-htitle" style="margin: 0 0 7px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.18; color: #2E2147;">{{ r.title }}</h3>
            <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--faint);">{{ r.meta }}</div>
          </a>
        </sc-for>
      </div>
    </section>
  </div>
  </sc-if>

  <!-- =================== NEWSLETTERS =================== -->
  <sc-if value="{{ isNewsletter }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}">
  <div style="max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 28px;">
    <section style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.1fr 1fr; gap: 50px; align-items: center; padding: 46px 0; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--navy); margin-bottom: 42px;">
      <div>
        <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 16px;">NEWSLETTERS</div>
        <h1 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 16px; font-size: 46px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.0; letter-spacing: -0.03em;">Asia, briefed.<br>Straight to your inbox.</h1>
        <p style="margin: 0 0 26px; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--muted); max-width: 50ch;">Five free newsletters across the verticals that matter, written by our editors and read by the people building Asia’s future.</p>
        <div style="display: flex; gap: 10px; max-width: 480px;">
          <input type="email" placeholder="Your email address" style="flex: 1; min-width: 0; background: var(--paper); border: 1px solid var(--line-strong); border-radius: 999px; padding: 14px 20px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 13.5px; color: var(--ink); outline: none;">
          <button class="ba-btn" style="background: var(--accent); color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 999px; padding: 14px 26px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap;">Get the Brief</button>
        </div>
        <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--faint); margin-top: 12px;">No spam. Unsubscribe in one click.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="ba-promo" style="color: var(--paper); padding: 34px; aspect-ratio: 4/3; border-radius: 3px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between;">
        <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: rgba(255,255,255,.5);">PREVIEW · MORNING BRIEF</div>
        <div>
          <div class="ba-serif" style="font-size: 31px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 16px; color: var(--paper);">Good morning. Here’s what moved Asia overnight.</div>
          <div style="height: 1px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.16); margin-bottom: 14px;"></div>
          <div style="font-size: 13.5px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.72); line-height: 1.7;">→  Lead: Singapore’s $50B pivot to ASEAN infrastructure<br>→  Deal: Temasek, KKR circle $4B payments stake<br>→  One chart: where the $50B is going</div>
        </div>
        <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.45);">~ 5 MIN READ · EVERY WEEKDAY 7AM SGT</div>
      </div>
    </section>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 20px;">
      <h2 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.018em;">Choose your briefings</h2>
      <span class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .06em; color: var(--faint);">Select as many as you like</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 18px; margin-bottom: 32px;">
      <sc-for list="{{ newslettersFull }}" as="n" hint-placeholder-count="5">
        <div onclick="{{ n.onToggle }}" style="cursor: pointer; padding: 22px 24px; border: 1.5px solid {{ n.borderColor }}; background: {{ n.bgColor }}; border-radius: 5px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; transition: border-color .15s ease, background .15s ease;">
          <div style="display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px;">
            <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
              <span class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .1em; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 600;">{{ n.freq }}</span>
              <sc-if value="{{ n.tag }}" hint-placeholder-val=""><span class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .1em; color: #fff; background: var(--accent); padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 999px; font-weight: 600;">{{ n.tag }}</span></sc-if>
            </div>
            <span style="flex: none; width: 22px; height: 22px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1.5px solid {{ n.boxBorder }}; background: {{ n.boxBg }}; display: grid; place-items: center;">
              <sc-if value="{{ n.selected }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}">
                <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M20 6 9 17l-5-5"></path></svg>
              </sc-if>
            </span>
          </div>
          <h3 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 9px; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em;">{{ n.name }}</h3>
          <p style="margin: 0 0 14px; font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--muted); flex: 1;">{{ n.desc }}</p>
          <span class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--faint);">{{ n.subs }} readers</span>
        </div>
      </sc-for>
      <sc-if value="{{ nlNotDone }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ true }}">
      <div class="ba-promo" style="color: var(--paper); border-radius: 5px; padding: 26px 26px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; gap: 16px;">
        <div>
          <div class="ba-serif" style="font-size: 23px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.18; margin-bottom: 6px;">One email. Every briefing you picked.</div>
          <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .06em; color: #f0a9b5;">{{ nlCountLabel }}</div>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px;">
          <input id="ba-nl-email" type="email" placeholder="Your email address" style="background: rgba(255,255,255,.12); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.4); border-radius: 999px; padding: 13px 18px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 13.5px; color: #fff; outline: none;">
          <button onclick="{{ subscribeNl }}" class="ba-btn" style="background: #fff; color: var(--navy); border: none; border-radius: 999px; padding: 13px 22px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer;">{{ nlSubmitLabel }}</button>
          <sc-if value="{{ nlErr }}" hint-placeholder-val="">
            <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 600; color: #ffd9df;">{{ nlErr }}</div>
          </sc-if>
        </div>
      </div>
      </sc-if>
      <sc-if value="{{ nlDone }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}">
      <div style="border: 1.5px solid #1f8a5b; background: #f0f8f3; border-radius: 5px; padding: 26px 26px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; gap: 14px;">
        <span style="flex: none; width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 999px; background: #1f8a5b; display: grid; place-items: center;"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M20 6 9 17l-5-5"></path></svg></span>
        <div>
          <div class="ba-serif" style="font-size: 22px; font-weight: 600; color: #176844;">You are subscribed.</div>
          <div style="font-size: 13.5px; color: #3c6b54;">Your selected briefings will start arriving on schedule. Check your inbox to confirm.</div>
        </div>
        <button onclick="{{ resetNl }}" class="ba-btn" style="align-self: flex-start; background: none; color: #176844; border: 1px solid #1f8a5b; border-radius: 999px; padding: 11px 20px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer;">Manage selection</button>
      </div>
      </sc-if>
    </div>
  </div>
  </sc-if>

  <!-- =================== ABOUT =================== -->
  <sc-if value="{{ isAbout }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}">
  <div style="max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 28px;">
    <section style="padding: 48px 0 36px; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--navy); margin-bottom: 44px;">
      <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 18px;">ABOUT BRIEFASIA</div>
      <h1 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 22px; font-size: clamp(40px, 6vw, 66px); font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.0; letter-spacing: -0.03em; max-width: 18ch;">Asia’s daily intelligence, reported by the people who live here.</h1>
      <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 20px; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--muted); max-width: 72ch;">BriefAsia is an independent newsroom covering business, finance, technology and the wider life of the region for the executives, investors and founders who cannot afford to be a day behind.</p>
    </section>

    <!-- APCG parent band -->
    <section class="ba-tint" style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.25fr 1fr; gap: 50px; align-items: center; border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 3px; padding: 40px; margin-bottom: 50px;">
      <div>
        <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 16px;">PART OF THE NETWORK</div>
        <h2 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 14px; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.18; letter-spacing: -0.01em;">Published by Asia Press Centre Group</h2>
        <p style="margin: 0 0 12px; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.62; color: var(--ink-soft);">BriefAsia is a title of Asia Press Centre Group, a media network headquartered in Singapore and trusted across business, finance, technology, travel and lifestyle. That foundation gives our newsroom the reach and standing of a regional institution, together with the independence of a dedicated daily.</p>
        <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.62; color: var(--ink-soft);">We report on Asia from inside Asia. The same editorial discipline that the Group is known for sits behind every story we publish.</p>
      </div>
      <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1px; background: var(--line-strong); border: 1px solid var(--line-strong); border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden;">
        <sc-for list="{{ aboutStats }}" as="st" hint-placeholder-count="4">
          <div style="background: var(--paper); padding: 22px 20px;">
            <div class="ba-serif" style="font-size: 32px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em;">{{ st.n }}</div>
            <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .08em; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 9px; text-transform: uppercase;">{{ st.l }}</div>
          </div>
        </sc-for>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 50px; padding-bottom: 50px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line); margin-bottom: 50px;">
      <div>
        <h2 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 14px; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600;">Our mission</h2>
        <p style="margin: 0 0 14px; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.62; color: var(--ink-soft);">Asia is the defining story of the century, and far too little of it is told well in English. The reporting that matters is scattered across markets, languages and paywalls. BriefAsia brings it together so that busy readers across the region have one trusted place to understand what just happened and why it matters.</p>
        <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.62; color: var(--ink-soft);">We hold ourselves to the standard of the best business press in the world, and we do it as a newsroom that belongs to the region rather than one that visits it. Our correspondents live where the news happens.</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h2 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 14px; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600;">What we cover</h2>
        <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 28px 30px;">
          <sc-for list="{{ coverList }}" as="c" hint-placeholder-count="8">
            <a onclick="{{ c.onClick }}" class="ba-navlink" style="cursor: pointer; border-top: 1px solid var(--line); padding: 13px 0 0; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 500; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;"><span>{{ c.label }}</span><span style="color: var(--faint);">→</span></a>
          </sc-for>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="ba-promo" style="display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 30px; flex-wrap: wrap; color: var(--paper); padding: 38px 40px; border-radius: 3px; margin-bottom: 50px;">
      <div style="max-width: 60ch;">
        <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: #f0a9b5; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 13px;">TRUST & TRANSPARENCY</div>
        <h2 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 9px; font-size: 26px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.18;">We report to a published standard</h2>
        <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; color: rgba(255,255,255,.72);">Independence, verification and corrections in the open. The same rules apply to every story we run, and you can read them in full.</p>
      </div>
      <div style="display: flex; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
        <a onclick="{{ goEditorial }}" class="ba-btn" style="cursor: pointer; flex: none; background: #fff; color: var(--navy); border-radius: 999px; padding: 13px 24px; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 600;">Editorial standards →</a>
        <a onclick="{{ goCorrections }}" class="ba-btn" style="cursor: pointer; flex: none; background: none; color: #fff; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.35); border-radius: 999px; padding: 13px 24px; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 600;">Corrections log</a>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Leadership -->
    <section style="padding-bottom: 50px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line); margin-bottom: 50px;">
      <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 22px;">LEADERSHIP</div>
      <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 280px 1fr; gap: 56px; align-items: start;">
        <div style="border-top: 2px solid var(--accent); padding-top: 18px;">
          <div class="ba-serif" style="font-size: 30px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.08; letter-spacing: -0.01em;">{{ editorInChief.name }}</div>
          <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .06em; color: var(--accent); margin-top: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600;">{{ editorInChief.role }}</div>
          <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 5px;">{{ editorInChief.base }}</div>
        </div>
        <div>
          <p class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 22px; font-size: 25px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.34; letter-spacing: -0.01em; max-width: 38ch;">“{{ editorInChief.quote }}”</p>
          <sc-for list="{{ editorInChief.bio }}" as="para" hint-placeholder-count="3">
            <p style="margin: 0 0 13px; font-size: 15.5px; line-height: 1.62; color: var(--ink-soft);">{{ para }}</p>
          </sc-for>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 36px; margin-top: 40px; padding-top: 36px; border-top: 1px solid var(--line);">
        <sc-for list="{{ deputies }}" as="d" hint-placeholder-count="2">
          <div style="display: flex; gap: 18px; align-items: flex-start;">
            <div class="ba-serif" style="flex: none; width: 60px; height: 60px; background: var(--paper-2); border: 1px solid var(--line-strong); border-radius: 3px; display: grid; place-items: center; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--ink-soft);">{{ d.initials }}</div>
            <div>
              <div class="ba-serif" style="font-size: 19px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.15;">{{ d.name }}</div>
              <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .05em; color: var(--accent); margin: 5px 0 9px; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600;">{{ d.role }}</div>
              <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--muted);">{{ d.bio }}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </sc-for>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- The newsroom -->
    <section style="padding-bottom: 54px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line); margin-bottom: 50px;">
      <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 26px; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px;">
        <h2 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600;">The newsroom</h2>
        <span class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .04em; color: var(--muted);">Correspondents reporting across the region</span>
      </div>
      <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1px; background: var(--line); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden;">
        <sc-for list="{{ journalists }}" as="j" hint-placeholder-count="6">
          <div style="background: var(--paper); padding: 26px 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px;">
            <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px;">
              <div class="ba-serif" style="flex: none; width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--paper-2); border: 1px solid var(--line-strong); display: grid; place-items: center; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--ink-soft);">{{ j.initials }}</div>
              <div>
                <div class="ba-serif" style="font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.12;">{{ j.name }}</div>
                <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .04em; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 5px;">{{ j.base }}</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .05em; color: var(--accent); text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600;">{{ j.role }}</div>
            <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.58; color: var(--ink-soft);">{{ j.bio }}</p>
          </div>
        </sc-for>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section style="padding-bottom: 54px;">
      <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 50px;">
        <div>
          <h2 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 20px; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600;">Bureaus</h2>
          <div>
            <sc-for list="{{ bureaus }}" as="b" hint-placeholder-count="6">
              <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; padding: 14px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);"><span class="ba-serif" style="font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600;">{{ b.city }}</span><span class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted);">{{ b.role }}</span></div>
            </sc-for>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h2 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 20px; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600;">Get in touch</h2>
          <div class="ba-tint" style="padding: 28px; border-radius: 3px;">
            <p style="margin: 0 0 18px; font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--ink-soft);">Story tips, corrections and partnership enquiries are all welcome. We read everything that reaches the newsroom.</p>
            <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px;">
              <a href="{{ hrefEditorAPC }}" style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 11px; font-size: 13.5px; color: var(--ink-soft); align-self: flex-start;"><span style="flex: none; display: inline-flex; color: var(--muted);">{{ icoEditorAPC }}</span><span class="ba-mono ba-uline">{{ emEditorAPC }}</span></a>
              <a href="{{ hrefPartnerAPC }}" style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 11px; font-size: 13.5px; color: var(--ink-soft); align-self: flex-start;"><span style="flex: none; display: inline-flex; color: var(--muted);">{{ icoPartnerAPC }}</span><span class="ba-mono ba-uline">{{ emPartnerAPC }}</span></a>
              <a href="{{ hrefMediaAPC }}" style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 11px; font-size: 13.5px; color: var(--ink-soft); align-self: flex-start;"><span style="flex: none; display: inline-flex; color: var(--muted);">{{ icoMediaAPC }}</span><span class="ba-mono ba-uline">{{ emMediaAPC }}</span></a>
              <div style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 11px; font-size: 13.5px; color: var(--ink-soft);"><span style="flex: none; display: inline-flex; color: var(--muted);">{{ icoPinAPC }}</span><span class="ba-mono">Asia Press Centre Group, Singapore</span></div>
            </div>
            <button onclick="{{ goContact }}" class="ba-btn" style="margin-top: 22px; background: var(--accent); color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 999px; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer;">All contact details →</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  </div>
  </sc-if>

  <!-- =================== EDITORIAL STANDARDS =================== -->
  <sc-if value="{{ isEditorial }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}">
  <div style="max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 28px;">
    <section style="padding: 40px 0 0;">
      <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 18px;">TRUST & TRANSPARENCY</div>
      <div style="display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--navy); padding-bottom: 18px;">
        <sc-for list="{{ trustNav }}" as="t" hint-placeholder-count="3">
          <a onclick="{{ t.onClick }}" class="ba-btn" style="cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 999px; white-space: nowrap; background: {{ t.bg }}; color: {{ t.fg }}; border: 1px solid {{ t.bd }};">{{ t.label }}</a>
        </sc-for>
      </div>
    </section>
    <section style="padding: 40px 0 30px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line); margin-bottom: 46px;">
      <h1 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 16px; font-size: clamp(38px, 5.4vw, 60px); font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.02; letter-spacing: -0.03em;">Editorial standards</h1>
      <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .08em; color: var(--muted);">LAST UPDATED · 12 MAY 2026</div>
      <p style="margin: 18px 0 0; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--muted); max-width: 72ch;">These are the rules our newsroom works to. They apply to every reporter and editor at BriefAsia, and they reflect the standards Asia Press Centre Group expects of its titles.</p>
    </section>
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 300px; gap: 60px; padding-bottom: 58px;">
      <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 34px; max-width: 72ch;">
        <sc-for list="{{ editorialSections }}" as="s" hint-placeholder-count="6">
          <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 34px 1fr; gap: 0 18px; align-items: start;">
            <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 13px; color: var(--faint); padding-top: 6px;">{{ s.num }}</div>
            <div>
              <h2 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 10px; font-size: 23px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.2;">{{ s.h }}</h2>
              <sc-for list="{{ s.body }}" as="para" hint-placeholder-count="1">
                <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.66; color: var(--ink-soft);">{{ para }}</p>
              </sc-for>
            </div>
          </div>
        </sc-for>
      </div>
      <aside>
        <div style="position: sticky; top: 24px; border-top: 2px solid var(--accent); padding-top: 18px;">
          <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .1em; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 14px;">HOLD US TO IT</div>
          <p style="margin: 0 0 16px; font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.62; color: var(--ink-soft);">If you believe we have fallen short of these standards, write to the newsroom and an editor will respond.</p>
          <a href="{{ hrefEditor }}" class="ba-mono ba-uline" style="display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; color: var(--ink-soft); margin-bottom: 14px;">{{ emEditor }}</a>
          <a onclick="{{ goCorrections }}" class="ba-uline" style="cursor: pointer; font-size: 13.5px; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600;">View the corrections log →</a>
        </div>
      </aside>
    </div>
  </div>
  </sc-if>

  <!-- =================== CORRECTIONS =================== -->
  <sc-if value="{{ isCorrections }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}">
  <div style="max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 28px;">
    <section style="padding: 40px 0 0;">
      <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 18px;">TRUST & TRANSPARENCY</div>
      <div style="display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--navy); padding-bottom: 18px;">
        <sc-for list="{{ trustNav }}" as="t" hint-placeholder-count="3">
          <a onclick="{{ t.onClick }}" class="ba-btn" style="cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 999px; white-space: nowrap; background: {{ t.bg }}; color: {{ t.fg }}; border: 1px solid {{ t.bd }};">{{ t.label }}</a>
        </sc-for>
      </div>
    </section>
    <section style="padding: 40px 0 30px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line); margin-bottom: 40px;">
      <h1 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 16px; font-size: clamp(38px, 5.4vw, 60px); font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.02; letter-spacing: -0.03em;">Corrections</h1>
      <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .08em; color: var(--muted);">PUBLIC LOG · MOST RECENT FIRST</div>
      <p style="margin: 18px 0 0; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--muted); max-width: 72ch;">When we correct a published article the change is recorded here in full, with the date, the original wording, the corrected wording and the editor who signed it off. We never alter a story quietly.</p>
    </section>
    <div style="max-width: 880px; padding-bottom: 58px;">
      <sc-for list="{{ corrections }}" as="c" hint-placeholder-count="3">
        <div style="border-top: 1px solid var(--line-strong); padding: 28px 0;">
          <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 11px;">
            <span class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: .04em;">{{ c.date }}</span>
            <span class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--faint); letter-spacing: .1em;">CORRECTION</span>
          </div>
          <h3 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 18px; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.25;">{{ c.article }}</h3>
          <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 26px;">
            <div style="border-left: 2px solid var(--line-strong); padding-left: 16px;">
              <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .08em; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 8px;">WHAT WE PUBLISHED</div>
              <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 14.5px; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--muted);">{{ c.original }}</p>
            </div>
            <div style="border-left: 2px solid var(--accent); padding-left: 16px;">
              <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .08em; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 8px;">WHAT IT NOW READS</div>
              <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 14.5px; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--ink-soft);">{{ c.corrected }}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--faint); margin-top: 16px;">Signed off by {{ c.editor }}</div>
        </div>
      </sc-for>
      <div style="border-top: 1px solid var(--line-strong); padding-top: 24px; margin-top: 4px;">
        <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.62; color: var(--muted); max-width: 64ch;">Spotted an error we have missed? Write to <a href="{{ hrefEditor }}" class="ba-mono ba-uline" style="color: var(--ink-soft);">{{ emEditor }}</a> and an editor will review it.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  </sc-if>

  <!-- =================== SPONSORED & AFFILIATE POLICY =================== -->
  <sc-if value="{{ isSponsored }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}">
  <div style="max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 28px;">
    <section style="padding: 40px 0 0;">
      <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 18px;">TRUST & TRANSPARENCY</div>
      <div style="display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--navy); padding-bottom: 18px;">
        <sc-for list="{{ trustNav }}" as="t" hint-placeholder-count="3">
          <a onclick="{{ t.onClick }}" class="ba-btn" style="cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 999px; white-space: nowrap; background: {{ t.bg }}; color: {{ t.fg }}; border: 1px solid {{ t.bd }};">{{ t.label }}</a>
        </sc-for>
      </div>
    </section>
    <section style="padding: 40px 0 30px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line); margin-bottom: 46px;">
      <h1 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 16px; font-size: clamp(38px, 5.4vw, 60px); font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.02; letter-spacing: -0.03em;">Sponsored & affiliate policy</h1>
      <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .08em; color: var(--muted);">LAST UPDATED · 1 JUNE 2026</div>
      <p style="margin: 18px 0 0; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--muted); max-width: 72ch;">How BriefAsia earns money from advertising, sponsorship and affiliate links, and the rules that keep all of it separate from our journalism.</p>
    </section>
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 300px; gap: 60px; padding-bottom: 58px;">
      <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 34px; max-width: 72ch;">
        <sc-for list="{{ sponsoredSections }}" as="s" hint-placeholder-count="6">
          <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 34px 1fr; gap: 0 18px; align-items: start;">
            <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 13px; color: var(--faint); padding-top: 6px;">{{ s.num }}</div>
            <div>
              <h2 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 10px; font-size: 23px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.2;">{{ s.h }}</h2>
              <sc-for list="{{ s.body }}" as="para" hint-placeholder-count="1">
                <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.66; color: var(--ink-soft);">{{ para }}</p>
              </sc-for>
            </div>
          </div>
        </sc-for>
      </div>
      <aside>
        <div style="position: sticky; top: 24px; border-top: 2px solid var(--accent); padding-top: 18px;">
          <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .1em; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 14px;">SPOT A PROBLEM?</div>
          <p style="margin: 0 0 16px; font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.62; color: var(--ink-soft);">If a sponsored or affiliate label is unclear, or you think commercial content has crossed into our journalism, tell an editor.</p>
          <a href="{{ hrefEditor }}" class="ba-mono ba-uline" style="display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; color: var(--ink-soft); margin-bottom: 14px;">{{ emEditor }}</a>
          <a onclick="{{ goEditorial }}" class="ba-uline" style="cursor: pointer; font-size: 13.5px; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600;">Read our editorial standards →</a>
        </div>
      </aside>
    </div>
  </div>
  </sc-if>

  <!-- =================== CONTACT =================== -->
  <sc-if value="{{ isContact }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}">
  <div style="max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 28px;">
    <section style="padding: 48px 0 36px; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--navy); margin-bottom: 44px;">
      <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 18px;">CONTACT</div>
      <h1 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 22px; font-size: clamp(40px, 6vw, 66px); font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.0; letter-spacing: -0.03em; max-width: 14ch;">Talk to the newsroom.</h1>
      <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 20px; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--muted); max-width: 70ch;">Pick the channel that fits. Every message reaches a real person at BriefAsia, and we aim to reply within one working day.</p>
    </section>

    <section style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1px; background: var(--line); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 50px;">
      <sc-for list="{{ contactChannels }}" as="c" hint-placeholder-count="4">
        <div style="background: var(--paper); padding: 34px 32px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px;">
          <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px;">
            <span style="flex: none; width: 46px; height: 46px; border-radius: 999px; background: #fbf3f4; color: var(--accent); display: grid; place-items: center; font-size: 19px;">{{ c.glyph }}</span>
            <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600;">{{ c.tag }}</div>
          </div>
          <h2 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0; font-size: 23px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.18;">{{ c.head }}</h2>
          <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 14.5px; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--muted); flex: 1;">{{ c.desc }}</p>
          <a href="{{ c.mailto }}" class="ba-uline" style="align-self: flex-start; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14.5px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--accent);">{{ c.email }}</a>
        </div>
      </sc-for>
    </section>

    <section class="ba-tint" style="border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 3px; padding: 40px; margin-bottom: 58px; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 50px;">
      <div>
        <h2 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 10px; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600;">Head office</h2>
        <p style="margin: 0 0 18px; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--ink-soft); max-width: 42ch;">BriefAsia is published by Asia Press Centre Group from its Singapore newsroom.</p>
        <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.75; color: var(--ink-soft);">Asia Press Centre Group<br>Bugis Cube<br>Singapore 188735</div>
        <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12.5px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 16px; letter-spacing: .03em;">MON to FRI · 09:00 to 18:00 SGT</div>
        <a href="{{ hrefInfoAPC }}" class="ba-uline" style="display: inline-block; margin-top: 16px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--accent);">{{ emInfoAPC }}</a>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h2 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 16px; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600;">Bureaus</h2>
        <sc-for list="{{ bureaus }}" as="b" hint-placeholder-count="6">
          <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; padding: 12px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);"><span class="ba-serif" style="font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600;">{{ b.city }}</span><span class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted);">{{ b.role }}</span></div>
        </sc-for>
      </div>
    </section>
  </div>
  </sc-if>

  <!-- =================== PODCAST =================== -->
  <sc-if value="{{ isPodcast }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}">
  <div style="max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 28px;">
    <section style="padding: 48px 0 36px; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--navy); margin-bottom: 44px;">
      <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 18px;">BRIEFASIA AUDIO</div>
      <h1 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 22px; font-size: clamp(40px, 6vw, 66px); font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.0; letter-spacing: -0.03em; max-width: 14ch;">Asia, in your ears.</h1>
      <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 20px; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--muted); max-width: 70ch;">Four shows from the BriefAsia newsroom, recorded across the region. The reporting you read, in the voices of the people who filed it.</p>
    </section>

    <!-- featured episode -->
    <section class="ba-frame" style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 340px 1fr; gap: 40px; align-items: center; border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 3px; padding: 36px; margin-bottom: 52px;">
      <div style="aspect-ratio: 1/1; background-color: var(--ph); border-radius: 3px; display: grid; place-items: center; position: relative;">
        <span class="ba-mono" style="position: absolute; top: 14px; left: 14px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--faint); letter-spacing: 0.07em;">COVER · MORNING BRIEF</span>
        <button onclick="{{ toggleAudio }}" class="ba-btn" aria-label="Play latest episode" style="width: 76px; height: 76px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--accent); color: #fff; border: none; cursor: pointer; display: grid; place-items: center; box-shadow: 0 12px 30px -8px rgba(0,0,0,.4);">
          <sc-if value="{{ audioOn }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="6" y="5" width="4" height="14" rx="1"></rect><rect x="14" y="5" width="4" height="14" rx="1"></rect></svg></sc-if>
          <sc-if value="{{ audioOff }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ true }}"><svg width="26" height="26" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M8 5v14l11-7z"></path></svg></sc-if>
        </button>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .1em; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 12px;">LATEST · {{ podcastFeatured.show }} · {{ podcastFeatured.ep }}</div>
        <h2 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 14px; font-size: 32px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.12; letter-spacing: -0.02em;">{{ podcastFeatured.title }}</h2>
        <p style="margin: 0 0 22px; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--ink-soft); max-width: 58ch;">{{ podcastFeatured.dek }}</p>
        <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 18px;">
          <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px; height: 34px;">
            <sc-for list="{{ waveBars }}" as="b" hint-placeholder-count="40"><span style="flex: 1; height: {{ b.h }}px; background: {{ b.color }}; border-radius: 1px;"></span></sc-for>
          </div>
          <span class="ba-mono" style="flex: none; font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); letter-spacing: .02em; white-space: nowrap;">{{ podFeatCur }} / {{ podFeatTotal }}</span>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
          <button onclick="{{ toggleAudio }}" class="ba-btn" style="background: var(--accent); color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 999px; padding: 13px 24px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 9px;">
            <sc-if value="{{ audioOn }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="6" y="5" width="4" height="14" rx="1"></rect><rect x="14" y="5" width="4" height="14" rx="1"></rect></svg>Pause</sc-if>
            <sc-if value="{{ audioOff }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ true }}"><svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M8 5v14l11-7z"></path></svg>Play episode</sc-if>
          </button>
          <span class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); letter-spacing: .03em;">{{ podcastFeatured.dur }} · {{ podcastFeatured.date }} · {{ podcastFeatured.host }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- shows -->
    <section style="margin-bottom: 54px;">
      <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--navy); padding-bottom: 14px; margin-bottom: 28px;">
        <h2 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0; font-size: 30px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.018em;">Our shows</h2>
        <span class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .07em; color: var(--faint);">New episodes every week</span>
      </div>
      <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 1px; background: var(--line); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden;">
        <sc-for list="{{ podShows }}" as="s" hint-placeholder-count="4">
          <a onclick="{{ openArticle }}" class="ba-card" style="cursor: pointer; background: var(--paper); padding: 28px 26px; display: flex; gap: 20px; align-items: flex-start;">
            <div style="flex: none; width: 84px; height: 84px; background-color: var(--ph); border-radius: 3px;"></div>
            <div>
              <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .08em; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 8px;">{{ s.tag }}</div>
              <h3 class="ba-serif ba-htitle" style="margin: 0 0 7px; font-size: 21px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.15;">{{ s.name }}</h3>
              <p style="margin: 0 0 10px; font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--muted);">{{ s.desc }}</p>
              <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--faint);">{{ s.eps }}</div>
            </div>
          </a>
        </sc-for>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- recent episodes -->
    <section style="margin-bottom: 54px;">
      <h2 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 20px; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600;">Recent episodes</h2>
      <div style="border-top: 1px solid var(--line-strong);">
        <sc-for list="{{ podEpisodes }}" as="e" hint-placeholder-count="5">
          <a onclick="{{ openArticle }}" class="ba-card" style="cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 22px; padding: 18px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);">
            <button class="ba-btn" aria-label="Play episode" style="flex: none; width: 46px; height: 46px; border-radius: 999px; background: none; border: 1px solid var(--line-strong); color: var(--accent); cursor: pointer; display: grid; place-items: center;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M8 5v14l11-7z"></path></svg></button>
            <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
              <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .07em; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 5px;">{{ e.show }}</div>
              <h3 class="ba-serif ba-htitle" style="margin: 0; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.2;">{{ e.title }}</h3>
            </div>
            <span class="ba-mono" style="flex: none; font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); letter-spacing: .03em; white-space: nowrap;">{{ e.dur }} · {{ e.date }}</span>
          </a>
        </sc-for>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- subscribe band -->
    <section class="ba-promo" style="color: var(--paper); padding: 40px 44px; border-radius: 3px; margin-bottom: 58px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 30px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
      <div style="max-width: 52ch;">
        <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: #f0a9b5; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 13px;">SUBSCRIBE</div>
        <h2 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 9px; font-size: 26px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.18;">Never miss an episode</h2>
        <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; color: rgba(255,255,255,.72);">Follow BriefAsia Audio wherever you listen. New episodes land every morning before the market opens.</p>
      </div>
      <div style="display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
        <sc-for list="{{ podPlatforms }}" as="p" hint-placeholder-count="5">
          <a class="ba-btn" style="cursor: pointer; flex: none; background: rgba(255,255,255,.1); color: #fff; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.28); border-radius: 999px; padding: 11px 20px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600;">{{ p }}</a>
        </sc-for>
      </div>
    </section>
  </div>
  </sc-if>

  <!-- =================== RSS / FEEDS =================== -->
  <sc-if value="{{ isRss }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}">
  <div style="max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 28px;">
    <section style="padding: 48px 0 36px; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--navy); margin-bottom: 44px;">
      <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 18px;">BRIEFASIA FEEDS</div>
      <h1 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 22px; font-size: clamp(40px, 6vw, 66px); font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.0; letter-spacing: -0.03em; max-width: 16ch;">Read BriefAsia in your own feed reader.</h1>
      <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 20px; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--muted); max-width: 72ch;">RSS lets you follow BriefAsia without an algorithm in the way. Paste any feed below into a reader like Feedly or NetNewsWire and every new story arrives in chronological order, no account required.</p>
    </section>

    <!-- main feed -->
    <section class="ba-promo" style="color: var(--paper); padding: 40px 44px; border-radius: 3px; margin-bottom: 50px;">
      <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: #f0a9b5; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 14px;">THE MAIN FEED</div>
      <h2 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 10px; font-size: 30px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.14;">Everything BriefAsia publishes</h2>
      <p style="margin: 0 0 24px; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; color: rgba(255,255,255,.72); max-width: 60ch;">{{ rssMainDesc }}</p>
      <div style="display: flex; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center;">
        <input value="{{ rssMainUrl }}" readonly="" onfocus="{{ selectOnFocus }}" style="flex: 1; min-width: 260px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.1); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.28); border-radius: 999px; padding: 13px 20px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; color: #fff; outline: none;">
        <button onclick="{{ copyRssMain }}" class="ba-btn" style="flex: none; background: #fff; color: var(--navy); border: none; border-radius: 999px; padding: 13px 24px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;">
          <sc-if value="{{ rssMainCopied }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}"><svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#1f8a5b" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M9 16.17 4.83 12l-1.42 1.41L9 19 21 7l-1.41-1.41z"></path></svg></sc-if>
          {{ rssMainCopyLabel }}
        </button>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- per-section feeds -->
    <section style="margin-bottom: 50px;">
      <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--navy); padding-bottom: 14px; margin-bottom: 26px;">
        <h2 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0; font-size: 30px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.018em;">Feeds by section</h2>
        <span class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .07em; color: var(--faint);">Follow only what you cover</span>
      </div>
      <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1px; background: var(--line); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden;">
        <sc-for list="{{ rssFeeds }}" as="f" hint-placeholder-count="6">
          <div style="background: var(--paper); padding: 24px 26px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 13px;">
            <div>
              <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 6px;">
                <svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="var(--accent)" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M4 11a9 9 0 019 9h2.5A11.5 11.5 0 004 8.5V11zm0 5a3 3 0 013 3h2.5A5.5 5.5 0 004 13.5V16zm1.5 2.5a1.5 1.5 0 11-3 0 1.5 1.5 0 013 0zM4 4v2.5A13.5 13.5 0 0117.5 20H20A16 16 0 004 4z"></path></svg>
                <h3 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.1;">{{ f.name }}</h3>
              </div>
              <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.5; color: var(--muted);">{{ f.desc }}</p>
            </div>
            <div style="display: flex; gap: 9px; align-items: center; margin-top: auto;">
              <input value="{{ f.url }}" readonly="" onfocus="{{ f.selectOnFocus }}" style="flex: 1; min-width: 0; background: var(--tint, #faf6f1); border: 1px solid var(--line-strong); border-radius: 7px; padding: 9px 12px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; color: var(--ink-soft); outline: none;">
              <button onclick="{{ f.onCopy }}" class="ba-btn" style="flex: none; background: none; color: var(--accent); border: 1px solid var(--line-strong); border-radius: 7px; padding: 9px 14px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; white-space: nowrap;">
                <sc-if value="{{ f.copied }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}"><svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#1f8a5b" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M9 16.17 4.83 12l-1.42 1.41L9 19 21 7l-1.41-1.41z"></path></svg></sc-if>
                {{ f.copyLabel }}
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </sc-for>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- how it works -->
    <section style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr; gap: 50px; padding-bottom: 56px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line); margin-bottom: 30px;">
      <div>
        <h2 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 20px; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600;">How to subscribe</h2>
        <ol style="margin: 0; padding: 0; list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 18px; counter-reset: step;">
          <li style="display: flex; gap: 14px; align-items: flex-start;"><span class="ba-mono" style="flex: none; width: 26px; height: 26px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--accent); color: #fff; display: grid; place-items: center; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700;">1</span><span style="font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--ink-soft);">Pick a feed reader app. Feedly and Inoreader run in any browser; NetNewsWire and Reeder are free on Mac and iOS.</span></li>
          <li style="display: flex; gap: 14px; align-items: flex-start;"><span class="ba-mono" style="flex: none; width: 26px; height: 26px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--accent); color: #fff; display: grid; place-items: center; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700;">2</span><span style="font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--ink-soft);">Copy any feed URL above and paste it into your reader's “Add feed” or “Follow” box.</span></li>
          <li style="display: flex; gap: 14px; align-items: flex-start;"><span class="ba-mono" style="flex: none; width: 26px; height: 26px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--accent); color: #fff; display: grid; place-items: center; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700;">3</span><span style="font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--ink-soft);">That's it. Every new story lands in your reader automatically, in full chronological order.</span></li>
        </ol>
      </div>
      <div class="ba-tint" style="border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 3px; padding: 28px 30px;">
        <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 16px;">WORKS WITH</div>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px;">
          <sc-for list="{{ rssReaders }}" as="r" hint-placeholder-count="5">
            <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 11px; font-size: 15px; color: var(--ink-soft); padding-bottom: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);"><span style="flex: none; width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--accent);"></span>{{ r }}</div>
          </sc-for>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  </div>
  </sc-if>

  

  <!-- =================== ACCOUNT / MY BRIEFASIA =================== -->
  <sc-if value="{{ isAccount }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}">
  <div style="max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 28px;">
    <!-- profile header -->
    <section style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 22px; padding: 44px 0 30px;">
      <span style="flex: none; width: 72px; height: 72px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--accent); color: #fff; display: grid; place-items: center; font-family:'IBM Plex Sans'; font-weight: 800; font-size: 28px;">{{ userInitial }}</span>
      <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
        <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .07em; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 7px;">MY BRIEFASIA</div>
        <h1 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 5px; font-size: 36px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1.05;">{{ acctGreeting }}</h1>
        <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12.5px; color: var(--muted);">{{ acctEmail }} · {{ acctPlan }} · {{ acctMemberSince }}</div>
      </div>
      <button onclick="{{ signOut }}" class="ba-btn" style="flex: none; background: none; color: var(--ink-soft); border: 1px solid var(--line-strong); border-radius: 999px; padding: 10px 20px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer;">Sign out</button>
    </section>

    <!-- stats -->
    <section style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 1px; background: var(--line-strong); border: 1px solid var(--line-strong); border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 6px;">
      <div style="background: var(--paper); padding: 20px 24px;"><div class="ba-serif" style="font-size: 32px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1;">{{ acctSavedCount }}</div><div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: .08em; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 7px; text-transform: uppercase;">Saved</div></div>
      <div style="background: var(--paper); padding: 20px 24px;"><div class="ba-serif" style="font-size: 32px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1;">{{ acctReadCount }}</div><div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: .08em; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 7px; text-transform: uppercase;">Recently read</div></div>
      <div style="background: var(--paper); padding: 20px 24px;"><div class="ba-serif" style="font-size: 32px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1;">{{ acctOfflineCount }}</div><div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: .08em; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 7px; text-transform: uppercase;">Offline</div></div>
      <div style="background: var(--paper); padding: 20px 24px;"><div class="ba-serif" style="font-size: 32px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1;">{{ acctFollowCount }}</div><div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: .08em; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 7px; text-transform: uppercase;">Following</div></div>
    </section>

    <!-- tabs -->
    <div style="display: flex; gap: 4px; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--navy); margin: 26px 0 30px;">
      <sc-for list="{{ acctTabs }}" as="t" hint-placeholder-count="5">
        <span onclick="{{ t.onClick }}" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Sans'; font-weight: {{ t.weight }}; font-size: 14px; padding: 12px 16px; cursor: pointer; color: {{ t.color }}; border-bottom: 2px solid {{ t.border }}; margin-bottom: -2px;">{{ t.label }}</span>
      </sc-for>
    </div>

    <!-- SAVED -->
    <sc-if value="{{ isAcctSaved }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ true }}">
    <section style="padding-bottom: 56px;">
      <sc-if value="{{ savedEmpty }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}">
        <div style="text-align: center; padding: 60px 0; color: var(--muted);"><div class="ba-serif" style="font-size: 22px; color: var(--ink); margin-bottom: 6px;">Nothing saved yet</div><div style="font-size: 14px;">Tap “Save article” on any story to keep it here.</div></div>
      </sc-if>
      <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; border-top: 1px solid var(--line-strong);">
        <sc-for list="{{ savedList }}" as="a" hint-placeholder-count="3">
          <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 24px; align-items: center; padding: 22px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);">
            <div onclick="{{ a.onRead }}" style="cursor: pointer; min-width: 0;">
              <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: .07em; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 7px;">{{ a.kicker }}</div>
              <h3 class="ba-serif ba-htitle" style="margin: 0 0 7px; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.18; letter-spacing: -0.01em;">{{ a.title }}</h3>
              <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 11.5px; color: var(--muted);">{{ a.author }} · {{ a.read }} · {{ a.date }}</div>
            </div>
            <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 9px; flex: none;">
              <button onclick="{{ a.onDownload }}" class="ba-btn" style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; background: none; color: var(--ink-soft); border: 1px solid var(--line-strong); border-radius: 999px; padding: 9px 15px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap;"><svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 3v12m0 0l-4-4m4 4l4-4M4 19h16"></path></svg>{{ a.dlLabel }}</button>
              <button onclick="{{ a.onRemove }}" class="ba-btn" aria-label="Remove" style="flex: none; width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 999px; background: none; color: var(--muted); border: 1px solid var(--line-strong); cursor: pointer; display: grid; place-items: center;"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 7h14M10 7V5h4v2m-7 0 1 13h8l1-13"></path></svg></button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </sc-for>
      </div>
    </section>
    </sc-if>

    <!-- HISTORY -->
    <sc-if value="{{ isAcctHistory }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}">
    <section style="padding-bottom: 56px;">
      <div style="display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; margin-bottom: 8px;">
        <sc-if value="{{ historyEmpty }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}"><span></span></sc-if>
        <span onclick="{{ clearHistory }}" class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--muted); cursor: pointer; letter-spacing: .03em;">Clear history</span>
      </div>
      <sc-if value="{{ historyEmpty }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}">
        <div style="text-align: center; padding: 60px 0; color: var(--muted);"><div class="ba-serif" style="font-size: 22px; color: var(--ink); margin-bottom: 6px;">No reading history</div><div style="font-size: 14px;">Stories you open will show up here.</div></div>
      </sc-if>
