      <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; border-top: 1px solid var(--line-strong);">
        <sc-for list="{{ historyList }}" as="a" hint-placeholder-count="4">
          <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 130px 1fr auto; gap: 22px; align-items: center; padding: 18px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);">
            <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 11.5px; color: var(--faint); letter-spacing: .03em;">{{ a.readAt }}</div>
            <div onclick="{{ a.onRead }}" style="cursor: pointer; min-width: 0;">
              <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: .07em; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 5px;">{{ a.kicker }}</div>
              <h3 class="ba-serif ba-htitle" style="margin: 0; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.2;">{{ a.title }}</h3>
            </div>
            <button onclick="{{ a.onSave }}" class="ba-btn" style="flex: none; background: none; color: {{ a.saveColor }}; border: 1px solid var(--line-strong); border-radius: 999px; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap;">{{ a.saveLabel }}</button>
          </div>
        </sc-for>
      </div>
    </section>
    </sc-if>

    <!-- OFFLINE -->
    <sc-if value="{{ isAcctOffline }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}">
    <section style="padding-bottom: 56px;">
      <div class="ba-tint" style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 3px; padding: 16px 20px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
        <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--accent)" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 3v12m0 0l-4-4m4 4l4-4M4 19h16"></path></svg>
        <span style="font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.5; color: var(--ink-soft);">Downloaded stories are saved to your device as self-contained files — open them any time, even with no connection.</span>
      </div>
      <sc-if value="{{ offlineEmpty }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}">
        <div style="text-align: center; padding: 50px 0; color: var(--muted);"><div class="ba-serif" style="font-size: 22px; color: var(--ink); margin-bottom: 6px;">No offline articles</div><div style="font-size: 14px;">Download any saved story to read it offline.</div></div>
      </sc-if>
      <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; border-top: 1px solid var(--line-strong);">
        <sc-for list="{{ offlineList }}" as="a" hint-placeholder-count="2">
          <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 22px; align-items: center; padding: 20px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);">
            <div onclick="{{ a.onRead }}" style="cursor: pointer; min-width: 0;">
              <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: .07em; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 6px;">{{ a.kicker }}</div>
              <h3 class="ba-serif ba-htitle" style="margin: 0 0 6px; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.2;">{{ a.title }}</h3>
              <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 11.5px; color: var(--muted);">Saved {{ a.savedAt }} · {{ a.size }} · {{ a.read }}</div>
            </div>
            <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 9px; flex: none;">
              <span style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #eaf5ef; color: #176844; border-radius: 999px; padding: 7px 13px; font-family:'IBM Plex Sans'; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 700;"><svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M9 16.17 4.83 12l-1.42 1.41L9 19 21 7l-1.41-1.41z"></path></svg>Available offline</span>
              <button onclick="{{ a.onRemove }}" class="ba-btn" aria-label="Remove download" style="flex: none; width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 999px; background: none; color: var(--muted); border: 1px solid var(--line-strong); cursor: pointer; display: grid; place-items: center;"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 7h14M10 7V5h4v2m-7 0 1 13h8l1-13"></path></svg></button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </sc-for>
      </div>
    </section>
    </sc-if>

    <!-- FOLLOWING -->
    <sc-if value="{{ isAcctFollowing }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}">
    <section style="padding-bottom: 56px;">
      <p style="font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--muted); max-width: 60ch; margin: 0 0 22px;">Follow the topics you care about. We use them to shape your homepage and the stories we surface first.</p>
      <div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px;">
        <sc-for list="{{ followChips }}" as="c" hint-placeholder-count="8">
          <span onclick="{{ c.onToggle }}" style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; cursor: pointer; background: {{ c.bg }}; color: {{ c.fg }}; border: 1.5px solid {{ c.bd }}; border-radius: 999px; padding: 10px 18px; font-family:'IBM Plex Sans'; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 600;">{{ c.label }}</span>
        </sc-for>
      </div>
    </section>
    </sc-if>

    <!-- SETTINGS -->
    <sc-if value="{{ isAcctSettings }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}">
    <section style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr; gap: 50px; padding-bottom: 56px;">
      <div>
        <h2 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 20px; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600;">Account details</h2>
        <label style="display:block; font-family:'IBM Plex Sans'; font-weight:700; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:0.06em; color:#2E2147; margin-bottom:6px;">NAME</label>
        <input type="text" value="{{ userName }}" style="width:100%; box-sizing:border-box; font-family:'IBM Plex Sans'; font-size:14px; color:#2E2147; border:1.5px solid #e0dcd3; border-radius:3px; padding:11px 13px; margin-bottom:16px; outline:none;">
        <label style="display:block; font-family:'IBM Plex Sans'; font-weight:700; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:0.06em; color:#2E2147; margin-bottom:6px;">EMAIL</label>
        <input type="email" value="{{ acctEmail }}" style="width:100%; box-sizing:border-box; font-family:'IBM Plex Sans'; font-size:14px; color:#2E2147; border:1.5px solid #e0dcd3; border-radius:3px; padding:11px 13px; margin-bottom:18px; outline:none;">
        <button class="ba-btn" style="background: var(--accent); color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 999px; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer;">Save changes</button>
      </div>
      <div class="ba-tint" style="border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 3px; padding: 26px 28px; align-self: start;">
        <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 18px;">PREFERENCES</div>
        <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 14px; padding: 12px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);"><span style="font-size: 14px; color: var(--ink-soft);">Morning Brief email</span><span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Sans'; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #176844;">On</span></div>
        <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 14px; padding: 12px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);"><span style="font-size: 14px; color: var(--ink-soft);">Breaking-news alerts</span><span style="font-family:'IBM Plex Sans'; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #176844;">On</span></div>
        <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 14px; padding: 12px 0;"><span style="font-size: 14px; color: var(--ink-soft);">Asia Edition</span><span class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted);">SGT · UTC+8</span></div>
      </div>
    </section>
    </sc-if>
  </div>
  </sc-if>

  <!-- =================== ADVERTISE =================== -->
  <sc-if value="{{ isAdvertise }}" hint-placeholder-val="{{ false }}">
  <div style="max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 28px;">
    <section style="padding: 48px 0 36px; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--navy); margin-bottom: 44px;">
      <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 18px;">PARTNER WITH US</div>
      <h1 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0 0 22px; font-size: clamp(40px, 6vw, 66px); font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.0; letter-spacing: -0.03em; max-width: 16ch;">Reach the people building Asia.</h1>
      <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 20px; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--muted); max-width: 72ch;">BriefAsia puts your brand in front of the executives, investors and founders who set the region's agenda, inside a newsroom they trust to tell them the truth.</p>
    </section>

    <!-- audience stats -->
    <section class="ba-tint" style="border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 3px; padding: 40px; margin-bottom: 50px;">
      <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600;">THE AUDIENCE</div>
      <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 1px; background: var(--line-strong); border: 1px solid var(--line-strong); border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden; margin-top: 22px;">
        <sc-for list="{{ adStats }}" as="st" hint-placeholder-count="4">
          <div style="background: var(--paper); padding: 26px 22px;">
            <div class="ba-serif" style="font-size: 38px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em;">{{ st.n }}</div>
            <div class="ba-mono" style="font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .08em; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 10px; text-transform: uppercase;">{{ st.l }}</div>
          </div>
        </sc-for>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- products -->
    <section style="margin-bottom: 54px;">
      <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--navy); padding-bottom: 14px; margin-bottom: 28px;">
        <h2 class="ba-serif" style="margin: 0; font-size: 30px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.018em;">Ways to partner</h2>

            <span class="ba-mono ba-uline" style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; align-self: flex-start;">Enquire →</span>
          </a>
        </sc-for>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- audience profile + reasons -->

      <div>

            <span class="ba-mono" style="flex: none; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .08em; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; width: 110px;">{{ a.l }}</span>

        </sc-for>
      </div>

    <!-- CTA band -->
    <section class="ba-promo" style="color: var(--paper); padding: 44px 46px; border-radius: 3px; margin-bottom: 58px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 30px; flex-wrap: wrap;">

        <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; color: rgba(255,255,255,.72);">Tell us your objective and our partnerships team will come back within one working day with a media kit and ideas.</p>

<script type="text/x-dc" data-dc-script="">
class Component extends DCLogic {
  state = { route: 'home', sectionName: 'Finance', subName: 'All', bannerOpen: true, geoLang: null, acrossShown: 8, authOpen: false, authMode: 'signin', authErr: '', user: null, curLang: 'en', acctTab: 'saved', langMenuOpen: false, nlSel: {}, nlErr: '', nlDone: false };
  toggleNl(name) { this.setState(s => { const next = Object.assign({}, s.nlSel); next[name] = !next[name]; return { nlSel: next, nlErr: '', nlDone: false }; }); }
  toggleAudio() {
    this.setState(s => {
      const on = !s.audioOn;
      clearInterval(this._audioTimer);
      if (on) {
        this._audioTimer = setInterval(() => {
          this.setState(st => {
            const p = (st.audioPct || 0) + 0.5;
            if (p >= 100) { clearInterval(this._audioTimer); return { audioPct: 100, audioOn: false }; }
            return { audioPct: p };
          });
        }, 120);
      }
      return { audioOn: on, audioPct: (s.audioPct >= 100 ? 0 : s.audioPct) };
    });
  }
  componentWillUnmount() { clearInterval(this._audioTimer); }
  copyLink(e) {
    if (e) e.preventDefault();
    const url = (typeof location !== 'undefined') ? location.href : '';
    const okPill = () => { clearTimeout(this._copyT); this.setState({ linkCopied: true, copyPromptUrl: '' }); this._copyT = setTimeout(() => this.setState({ linkCopied: false }), 1800); };
    const fallback = () => {
      clearTimeout(this._copyT);
      this.setState({ copyPromptUrl: url, linkCopied: false }, () => { try { const el = document.getElementById('ba-copy-input'); if (el) { el.focus(); el.select(); } } catch (x) {} });
      this._copyT = setTimeout(() => this.setState({ copyPromptUrl: '' }), 6000);
    };
    let execOk = false;
    try {
      const ta = document.createElement('textarea');
      ta.value = url; ta.setAttribute('readonly', '');
      ta.style.position = 'fixed'; ta.style.top = '0'; ta.style.left = '0'; ta.style.opacity = '0';
      document.body.appendChild(ta);
      ta.focus(); ta.select(); try { ta.setSelectionRange(0, url.length); } catch (x) {}
      execOk = document.execCommand('copy');
      document.body.removeChild(ta);
    } catch (x) {}
    if (execOk) { okPill(); return; }
    if (navigator.clipboard && navigator.clipboard.writeText) { navigator.clipboard.writeText(url).then(okPill).catch(fallback); return; }
    fallback();
  }
  subscribeNl() {
    const email = ((document.getElementById('ba-nl-email') || {}).value || '').trim();
    const count = Object.keys(this.state.nlSel).filter(k => this.state.nlSel[k]).length;
    if (count === 0) { this.setState({ nlErr: 'Select at least one newsletter to subscribe to.' }); return; }

  subscribeCta() {

  closeAuth() { this.setState({ authOpen: false, authErr: '' }); }
  submitAuth() {
    const g = id => (document.getElementById(id) || {}).value || '';
    const email = g('ba-auth-email').trim();
    const pass = g('ba-auth-pass');
    const name = g('ba-auth-name').trim();
    const isCreate = this.state.authMode === 'create';
    if (!/^[^@\s]+@[^@\s]+\.[^@\s]+$/.test(email)) { this.setState({ authErr: 'Enter a valid email address.' }); return; }
    if (pass.length < 6) { this.setState({ authErr: 'Password must be at least 6 characters.' }); return; }
    if (isCreate && !name) { this.setState({ authErr: 'Enter your name.' }); return; }
    const display = isCreate ? name : email.split('@')[0].replace(/[._-]+/g, ' ').replace(/\b\w/g, c => c.toUpperCase());
    const user = { name: display, email };
    try { localStorage.setItem('ba_user', JSON.stringify(user)); } catch (e) {}
    this.setState({ user, authOpen: false, authErr: '' });
  }

  loadAccount() {
    const seeds = this.accountSeeds();
    const read = (k, def) => { try { const v = localStorage.getItem('ba_' + k); return v ? JSON.parse(v) : def; } catch (e) { return def; } };
    this.setState({
      acctSaved: read('saved', seeds.saved),
      acctHistory: read('history', seeds.history),
      acctOffline: read('offline', seeds.offline),
      acctFollowing: read('following', seeds.following),
    });
    let rc = 0; try { rc = parseInt(localStorage.getItem('ba_readcount') || '0', 10) || 0; } catch (e) {}
    this.setState({ readCount: rc });
  }
  saveAcct(k, val) { try { localStorage.setItem('ba_' + k, JSON.stringify(val)); } catch (e) {} }
  setAcctTab(t) { this.setState({ acctTab: t }); }
  isSaved(id) { return (this.state.acctSaved || []).some(x => x.id === id); }
  toggleSave(article) {
    if (!this.state.user) { this.openAuth('signin'); return; }
    this.setState(s => {
      const cur = s.acctSaved || [];
      const has = cur.some(x => x.id === article.id);
      const next = has ? cur.filter(x => x.id !== article.id) : [Object.assign({}, article), ...cur];
      this.saveAcct('saved', next);
      return { acctSaved: next };
    });
  }
  removeSaved(id) { this.setState(s => { const next = (s.acctSaved || []).filter(x => x.id !== id); this.saveAcct('saved', next); return { acctSaved: next }; }); }
  removeOffline(id) { this.setState(s => { const next = (s.acctOffline || []).filter(x => x.id !== id); this.saveAcct('offline', next); return { acctOffline: next }; }); }
  clearHistory() { this.setState(() => { this.saveAcct('history', []); return { acctHistory: [] }; }); }
  toggleFollow(topic) {
    this.setState(s => {
      const cur = s.acctFollowing || [];
      const next = cur.includes(topic) ? cur.filter(t => t !== topic) : cur.concat([topic]);
      this.saveAcct('following', next);
      return { acctFollowing: next };
    });
  }
  recordHistory(article) {
    let rc = 0; try { rc = parseInt(localStorage.getItem('ba_readcount') || '0', 10) || 0; } catch (e) {}
    rc += 1; try { localStorage.setItem('ba_readcount', String(rc)); } catch (e) {}
    this.setState(s => {
      const cur = (s.acctHistory || []).filter(x => x.id !== article.id);
      const next = [Object.assign({}, article, { readAt: 'Just now' })].concat(cur).slice(0, 16);
      this.saveAcct('history', next);
      return { acctHistory: next, readCount: rc };
    });
  }
  downloadArticle(article) {
    const esc = (t) => String(t || '').replace(/&/g, '&').replace(/</g, '<').replace(/>/g, '>');
    const paras = (article.paras || [article.dek || '']).map(p => '<p style="margin:0 0 18px;">' + esc(p) + '</p>').join('');
    const html = '<!doctype html><html><head><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1"><title>' + esc(article.title) + ' \u2014 BriefAsia</title>'
      + '<style>body{font-family:Georgia,serif;max-width:680px;margin:40px auto;padding:0 22px;color:#241a33;line-height:1.6;}h1{font-size:30px;line-height:1.15;}.k{font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.08em;color:#A60F2D;}.m{font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:12px;color:#8a857c;margin-bottom:24px;}.dek{font-size:19px;color:#544e57;}.f{font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;color:#b9b1c9;margin-top:40px;border-top:1px solid #eee;padding-top:14px;}</style></head><body>'
      + '<div class="k">' + esc(article.kicker) + '</div><h1>' + esc(article.title) + '</h1>'
      + '<div class="m">' + esc(article.author) + ' \u00b7 ' + esc(article.read) + ' \u00b7 ' + esc(article.date) + '</div>'
      + '<p class="dek">' + esc(article.dek) + '</p>' + paras
      + '<div class="f">Saved from BriefAsia for offline reading \u00b7 briefasia.com</div></body></html>';
    try {
      const blob = new Blob([html], { type: 'text/html' });
      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      const a = document.createElement('a');
      a.href = url; a.download = (article.id || 'article') + '-briefasia.html';
      document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); a.remove();
      setTimeout(() => { try { URL.revokeObjectURL(url); } catch (e) {} }, 1500);
      const sizeKB = Math.max(1, Math.round(html.length / 1024));
      this.setState(s => {
        const cur = s.acctOffline || [];
        if (cur.some(x => x.id === article.id)) return {};
        const next = [Object.assign({}, article, { size: sizeKB + ' KB', savedAt: 'Just now' })].concat(cur);
        this.saveAcct('offline', next);
        return { acctOffline: next };
      });
    } catch (e) {}
  }
  go(route) { if (route === 'article') { this.recordHistory(this.demoArticle()); } this.setState({ route }); try { window.scrollTo(0, 0); } catch (e) {} }
  copyFeed(url, e) {
    if (e) e.preventDefault();
    const okPill = () => { clearTimeout(this._feedT); this.setState({ feedCopied: url }); this._feedT = setTimeout(() => this.setState({ feedCopied: '' }), 1800); };
    let execOk = false;
    try {
      const ta = document.createElement('textarea');
      ta.value = url; ta.setAttribute('readonly', '');
      ta.style.position = 'fixed'; ta.style.top = '0'; ta.style.left = '0'; ta.style.opacity = '0';
      document.body.appendChild(ta);
      ta.focus(); ta.select(); try { ta.setSelectionRange(0, url.length); } catch (x) {}
      execOk = document.execCommand('copy');
      document.body.removeChild(ta);
    } catch (x) {}
    if (execOk) { okPill(); return; }
    if (navigator.clipboard && navigator.clipboard.writeText) { navigator.clipboard.writeText(url).then(okPill).catch(okPill); return; }
    okPill();
  }

    const MAP = { VN:{name:'Tiếng Việt',cta:'Đọc Tiếng Việt',tl:'vi'}, TH:{name:'ภาษาไทย',cta:'อ่านภาษาไทย',tl:'th'}, ID:{name:'Bahasa Indonesia',cta:'Baca Bahasa Indonesia',tl:'id'}, JP:{name:'日本語',cta:'日本語で読む',tl:'ja'}, KR:{name:'한국어',cta:'한국어로 읽기',tl:'ko'}, TW:{name:'繁體中文',cta:'閱讀中文',tl:'zh-TW'}, CN:{name:'简体中文',cta:'阅读中文',tl:'zh-CN'} };
    try { fetch('https://ipapi.co/json/').then(r=>r.json()).then(d=>{ const m=MAP[((d&&d.country_code)||'').toUpperCase()]; if(m) this.setState({geoLang:m}); }).catch(()=>{}); } catch(e){}

  gtxTranslate(text, tl) {
    const url = 'https://translate.googleapis.com/translate_a/single?client=gtx&sl=en&tl=' + tl + '&dt=t&q=' + encodeURIComponent(text);
    return fetch(url).then(r => r.json()).then(j => (j && j[0]) ? j[0].map(s => s[0]).join('') : text).catch(() => text);
  }
  async applyLang(tl) {
    if (this._translating) return;
    if (!tl || tl === 'en') {
      if (this._orig) { this._orig.forEach(p => { p[0].nodeValue = p[1]; }); this._orig = null; }
      this.setState({ bannerOpen: false, curLang: 'en', langMenuOpen: false });
      return;
    }
    // if already translated, restore English first so we translate from source
    if (this._orig) { this._orig.forEach(p => { p[0].nodeValue = p[1]; }); this._orig = null; }
    this._translating = true;
    // set label + close menus first, then translate the freshly-rendered DOM (no further setState after)
    this.setState({ bannerOpen: false, curLang: tl, langMenuOpen: false });
    await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 40));
    const skip = { SCRIPT: 1, STYLE: 1, NOSCRIPT: 1 };
    const walker = document.createTreeWalker(document.body, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT, {
      acceptNode: n => {
        const v = n.nodeValue;
        if (!v || !v.trim() || v.trim().length < 2) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;
        const p = n.parentNode;
        if (!p || skip[p.nodeName]) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;
        if (p.closest && p.closest('.ba-logo, [data-noi18n]')) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;
        if (/^[\s\d.,:;%+\-–—·/$#&()|×▲▼°'"©]+$/.test(v)) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;
        return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT;
      }
    });
    const nodes = []; let x;
    while ((x = walker.nextNode())) nodes.push(x);
    this._orig = nodes.map(n => [n, n.nodeValue]);
    const cache = {};
    let i = 0;
    const work = async () => {
      while (i < nodes.length) {
        const n = nodes[i++];
        const raw = n.nodeValue;
        const key = raw.trim();
        let tr = cache[key];
        if (tr === undefined) { tr = await this.gtxTranslate(key, tl); cache[key] = tr; }
        n.nodeValue = raw.replace(key, tr);
      }
    };
    await Promise.all(Array.from({ length: 10 }, work));
    this._translating = false;
  }

      title: "Singapore's sovereign fund pivots $50B toward Southeast Asian infrastructure",
      standfirst: 'In its biggest strategic reallocation since 2008, the fund is shifting away from developed-market equities and into the ports, grids and data centres that will carry the region’s next decade of growth.',
      author: 'Mei Lin Tan', role: 'Markets Editor · Singapore',

    const bodyParas = [
      'When the fund’s investment committee met last month, the brief on the table was unusually blunt: the next decade of returns will not look like the last. For fifteen years, a portfolio anchored in US and European equities did exactly what it was supposed to do. The committee’s quiet conclusion was that the same allocation, held into 2035, would underperform the region sitting on its own doorstep.',
      'The reallocation, roughly $50 billion phased over three years, is less a single trade than a thesis. Southeast Asia is mid-way through an infrastructure build-out comparable in scale to China’s in the 2000s, but spread across six democracies with very different politics, currencies and risk profiles. The fund is betting that the hard assets underneath that build-out are mispriced.',
      'Three lanes dominate the new mandate. The first is data centres, where demand from AI workloads has outrun the region’s ability to supply power and land. The second is power transmission, the unglamorous grid infrastructure that, as our reporting has shown, is now the single biggest bottleneck throttling Asia’s renewable boom. The third is ports and logistics, the physical layer of a supply chain rerouting itself away from single-country dependence.',
      'Vietnam, Indonesia and the Philippines absorb the largest allocations, a ranking that tracks less with current GDP than with demographic runway and the credibility of each government’s reform agenda. Notably, the fund has structured much of the exposure through co-investments with domestic partners, a hedge against the political and execution risk that has burned foreign infrastructure money in the region before.',
      'Whether the bet pays off will not be clear for years. But the signal is already loud. When one of the world’s most conservative allocators decides that the safest place for $50 billion is Southeast Asian concrete and copper, the rest of the market tends to follow.',
